name: roboapply-server
description: RoboApply standalone API — Express backend (roboapply routes + interview-engine) compiled to dist/ and served on Vercel via /api/index.ts.
//: No dependencies here on purpose — all runtime deps live in the root package.json and resolve up the tree. This package.json exists only to mark server/dist/**.js as ESM ('type':'module') for NodeNext output.
